meta.title: About Vergeo5
meta.description: Vergeo5 is Zambia's mobile-first marketplace for products, services and events — with money held safely in escrow until you get what you paid for.

hero.headline: Zambia's marketplace, built for trust
hero.subhead: Vergeo5 brings products, services and events into one place — with escrow that holds your money until delivery is confirmed.

mission.heading: Our mission
mission.body: Make buying and selling online in Zambia safe, simple and fast — even on a slow connection. Every order is protected by escrow, every payout reaches vendors in minutes on mobile money, and every conversation can happen on WhatsApp.

trust.title: Trust first
trust.body: You pay, we hold, the vendor ships, you confirm — then funds release. No hoping a stranger delivers.

local.title: Built for Zambia
local.body: Mobile-money-first (MTN, Airtel), landmark addressing, Lusaka delivery and nationwide pickup, priced in Kwacha.

fast.title: Fast on any network
fast.body: Designed for 360px screens and 3G. Light pages, small images, no wasted data.

fair.title: Fair to vendors
fair.body: Transparent commissions shown before you publish, and payouts within 48 hours — usually minutes on mobile money.

howItWorks.heading: How Vergeo5 works
howItWorks.step1: Discover products, services and events from sellers across Zambia.
howItWorks.step2: Pay by mobile money, card or cash on delivery for orders up to K500.
howItWorks.step3: Your money is held safely in escrow until you confirm delivery.
howItWorks.step4: We release funds to the vendor — and step in if anything goes wrong.

meta.title: Contact Vergeo5
meta.description: Reach the Vergeo5 team on WhatsApp for the fastest reply, or send us a message and we'll get back to you by email.

hero.headline: Talk to a human
hero.subhead: WhatsApp is the fastest way to reach us. Prefer to write? Send a message below and we'll reply by email.

whatsapp.heading: Chat on WhatsApp
whatsapp.body: Message our support team directly — we usually reply within a few hours during business days.
whatsapp.hint: Opens WhatsApp with a message ready to send.

hours.heading: When we're around
hours.body: Monday to Saturday, 08:00–18:00 (CAT). Messages sent outside these hours are answered the next working day.

form.heading: Send a message
form.phonePlaceholder: So we can reply to you
form.success: Thanks — your message is on its way. We'll be in touch soon.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again, or reach us on WhatsApp.
form.errorRateLimited: You've sent a few messages already. Please wait a moment before sending another.

validation.messageTooShort: Please add a little more detail.
validation.messageTooLong: That message is too long — please shorten it.
validation.contactTooLong: That contact detail is too long.

meta.title: Help Centre
meta.description: Answers about escrow, payments, delivery, returns, tickets and selling on Vergeo5.

hero.headline: How can we help?
hero.subhead: Search our guides, or browse by topic. Still stuck? Message us on WhatsApp.

search.label: Search help articles
search.resultsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No articles found} one {# article} other {# articles}}
search.noResultsHint: Try a different word, or message us on WhatsApp.

cta.heading: Didn't find your answer?
cta.body: Our team is a message away.

notFound.heading: We can't find that page
notFound.body: The page you're looking for may have moved or no longer exists.

error.heading: Something went wrong
error.body: We hit an unexpected problem. Please try again — if it keeps happening, let us know.

meta.title: Vergeo5 beta access
meta.description: Vergeo5 is in invite-only beta. Enter your invite code to get early access to Zambia's marketplace.

hero.headline: You're early
hero.subhead: Vergeo5 is in invite-only beta. Enter your invite code below to get in.

success.heading: You're in!
success.body: Your invite worked. Welcome to the Vergeo5 beta.

errors.invalid: That invite code isn't valid. Check it and try again.
errors.expired: This invite code has expired. Ask for a fresh one.
errors.exhausted: This invite code has been fully used up.
errors.inactive: This invite code isn't active yet.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
errors.rateLimited: Too many tries. Please wait a moment and try again.

feedback.heading: Send beta feedback
feedback.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind…
feedback.screenshotLabel: Attach a screenshot of this page
feedback.success: Thanks! Your feedback is on its way to the team.
feedback.errorGeneric: Couldn't send that. Please try again.
feedback.errorRateLimited: You've sent a lot of feedback — please wait a moment.

validation.messageRequired: Please add a little detail before sending.
